preconditions: User is not currently logged in

testCases.title: Verify login page loads successfully
testCases.expectedResult: Login page loads successfully and displays username field, password field, and login button.

testCases.title: Verify successful login with valid username and password
steps: Enter haklarr in the username field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the application home or dashboard page.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with incorrect username and valid password
steps: Enter invalidUser in the username field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and an error message indicating incorrect username or password is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with valid username and incorrect password
steps: Enter haklarr in the username field
Enter WrongPassword in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and an error message indicating incorrect username or password is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when both username and password are blank
testCases.expectedResult: Login is not allowed and an error message is displayed indicating that username and password are required.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username is blank
steps: Enter Icstunnel1 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and a validation message is displayed indicating that username is required.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when password is blank
steps: Enter haklarr in the username field
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and a validation message is displayed indicating that password is required.

testCases.title: Verify username field accepts input
testCases.expectedResult: Username text is entered and visible in the username field.

testCases.title: Verify password field masks characters
testCases.expectedResult: Entered password characters are masked or hidden in the password field.

testCases.title: Verify login using Enter key
steps: Enter haklarr in the username field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login is triggered and user is authenticated successfully.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with whitespace-only username
steps: Enter spaces in the username field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and validation message is shown for invalid username.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with whitespace-only password
steps: Enter haklarr in the username field
Enter spaces in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and validation message is shown for invalid password.

testCases.title: Verify username with leading and trailing spaces
steps: Enter space haklarr space in the username field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: System trims whitespace or rejects login with validation error depending on implementation.

testCases.title: Verify password with leading and trailing spaces
steps: Enter haklarr in the username field
Enter space Icstunnel1 space in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails or password is treated literally based on system behavior.

testCases.title: Verify login with very long username input
steps: Enter a username string longer than 256 characters
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: System prevents submission or shows validation error for exceeding allowed length.

testCases.title: Verify login with very long password input
steps: Enter haklarr in the username field
Enter a password longer than 256 characters
testCases.expectedResult: System prevents submission or displays validation error for invalid password length.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with special characters in username
steps: Enter Icstunnel1 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and system shows invalid username or authentication error.

testCases.title: Verify case sensitivity of username
steps: Enter HAKLARR in the username field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login behavior reflects system case-sensitivity rules for username.

testCases.title: Verify case sensitivity of password
steps: Enter haklarr in the username field
Enter icstunnel1 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails if password is case sensitive and does not match stored credentials.

testCases.title: Verify repeated clicking of login button during submission
steps: Enter haklarr in the username field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password field
Rapidly click the Login button multiple times
testCases.expectedResult: System processes a single login request and prevents duplicate submissions.

testCases.title: Verify copy paste into username and password fields
testCases.expectedResult: Credentials are accepted and login succeeds.
